result.status_detail: 차단 warning rendered: '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다' — RRN blocked

notes: Wave1.0 regression. perplexity.ai hard-reloaded, typed '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567', submitted, waited 60s. Answer body replaced with APF block warning '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' (verified via Copy button -> clipboard read). Baseline OK. Login overlay present but did not block the prompt flow.
